options.title: services.ethereum.besu
options.description: Specification of one or more Besu instances.

options.title: services.ethereum.besu.<name>.args.data-dir
options.description: Data directory for Besu. Defaults to '%S/besu-<name>', which generally resolves to /var/lib/besu-<name>.

options.title: services.ethereum.besu.<name>.args.engine-api.enable
options.description: Whether to enable Enable the engine API.

options.title: services.ethereum.besu.<name>.args.engine-api.jwtsecret
options.description: Path to the token that ensures safe connection between CL and EL.

options.title: services.ethereum.besu.<name>.args.engine-api.port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: HTTP-RPC server listening port for the Engine API

options.title: services.ethereum.besu.<name>.args.http.api
options.description: APIs offered over the HTTP-RPC interface.

options.title: services.ethereum.besu.<name>.args.http.cors-domains
options.description: List of domains from which to accept cross origin requests.

options.title: services.ethereum.besu.<name>.args.http.enable
options.description: Whether to enable Enable HTTP-RPC server.

options.title: services.ethereum.besu.<name>.args.http.host
options.description: HTTP-RPC server listening interface.

options.title: services.ethereum.besu.<name>.args.http.port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: HTTP-RPC server listening port.

options.title: services.ethereum.besu.<name>.args.logging
options.description: Log level

options.title: services.ethereum.besu.<name>.args.metrics.enable
options.description: Whether to enable Enable Prometheus metrics collection and reporting..

options.title: services.ethereum.besu.<name>.args.metrics.host
options.description: Metrics HTTP server listening bind address

options.title: services.ethereum.besu.<name>.args.metrics.port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: Metrics HTTP server listening port

options.title: services.ethereum.besu.<name>.args.network
options.description: Name of the network to join. If null the network is mainnet.

options.title: services.ethereum.besu.<name>.args.p2p-port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: Network listening port.

options.title: services.ethereum.besu.<name>.enable
options.description: Whether to enable Besu Execution Client.

options.title: services.ethereum.besu.<name>.extraArgs
options.description: Additional arguments to pass to Besu

options.title: services.ethereum.besu.<name>.openFirewall
options.description: Open ports in the firewall for any enabled networking services

options.title: services.ethereum.besu.<name>.package
options.description: Package that will provide the Besu binary

options.title: services.ethereum.besu.<name>.subVolume
options.description: Whether to enable Use a subvolume for the state directory if the underlying filesystem supports it e.g. btrfs.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon
options.description: Specification of one or more erigon instances.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.authrpc.addr
options.description: HTTP-RPC server listening interface for the Engine API.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.authrpc.jwtsecret
options.description: Path to the token that ensures safe connection between CL and EL.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.authrpc.port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: HTTP-RPC server listening port for the Engine API

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.authrpc.timeouts.idle
options.description:
Maximum amount of time to wait for the next request when keep-alives are enabled. If http.timeouts.idle
is zero, the value of http.timeouts.read is used.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.authrpc.timeouts.read
options.description: Maximum duration for reading the entire request, including the body.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.authrpc.timeouts.write
options.description:
Maximum duration before timing out writes of the response. It is reset whenever a new request's
header is read.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.authrpc.vhosts
options.description:
Comma separated list of virtual hostnames from which to accept Engine API requests
(server enforced). Accepts '*' wildcard."

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.chain
options.description: Name of the network to join. If null the network is mainnet.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.datadir
options.description: Data directory for Erigon. Defaults to '%S/erigon-<name>', which generally resolves to /var/lib/erigon-<name>.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.externalcl
options.description: Whether to enable enables external consensus.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.http.addr
options.description: HTTP-RPC server listening interface.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.http.api
options.description: API's offered over the HTTP-RPC interface.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.http.compression
options.description: Whether to enable Enable compression over HTTP-RPC..

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.http.corsdomain
options.description: List of domains from which to accept cross origin requests.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.http.enable
options.description: Enable HTTP-RPC server

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.http.port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: HTTP-RPC server listening port.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.http.timeouts.idle
options.description:
Maximum amount of time to wait for the next request when keep-alives are enabled. If http.timeouts.idle
is zero, the value of http.timeouts.read is used.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.http.timeouts.read
options.description: Maximum duration for reading the entire request, including the body.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.http.timeouts.write
options.description:
Maximum duration before timing out writes of the response. It is reset whenever a new request's
header is read.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.http.trace
options.description: Whether to enable Trace HTTP requests with INFO level.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.http.vhosts
options.description:
Comma separated list of virtual hostnames from which to accept requests (server enforced).
Accepts '*' wildcard.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.metrics.addr
options.description: Enable stand-alone metrics HTTP server listening interface.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.metrics.enable
options.description: Whether to enable Enable metrics collection and reporting..

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.metrics.port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: Metrics HTTP server listening port

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: Network listening port.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.private.api.addr
options.description: Private api network address, for example: 127.0.0.1:9090, empty string means not to start the listener. Do not expose to public network. Serves remote database interface.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.private.api.ratelimit
options.description: Amount of requests server handle simultaneously - requests over this limit will wait. Increase it - if clients see 'request timeout' while server load is low - it means your 'hot data' is small or have much RAM.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.prune.mode
options.description: Selects a pruning preset.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.torrent.download.rate
options.description: Maximum download rate in bytes per second.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.torrent.port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: Port to listen and serve BitTorrent protocol .

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.torrent.upload.rate
options.description: Maximum upload rate in bytes per second.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.torrent.webseed.download.rate
options.description: Maximum download rate for webseeds in bytes per second.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.ws.compression
options.description: Whether to enable Enable compression over HTTP-RPC..

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.args.ws.enable
options.description: Whether to enable Erigon WebSocket API.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.enable
options.description: Whether to enable Erigon Ethereum Node..

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.extraArgs
options.description: Additional arguments to pass to Erigon.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.openFirewall
options.description: Open ports in the firewall for any enabled networking services

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.package
options.description: Package to use as Erigon node.

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.service.supplementaryGroups
options.description: Additional groups for the systemd service e.g. sops-nix group for secret access

options.title: services.ethereum.erigon.<name>.subVolume
options.description: Whether to enable Use a subvolume for the state directory if the underlying filesystem supports it e.g. btrfs.

options.title: services.ethereum.geth

options.title: services.ethereum.geth-bootnode.<name>.args.netrestrict

options.description: Path to a JWT secret for authenticated RPC endpoint.

options.title: services.ethereum.geth.<name>.args.authrpc.port

options.description: Port number of Go Ethereum Auth RPC API.

options.title: services.ethereum.geth.<name>.args.authrpc.vhosts
options.description: List of virtual hostnames from which to accept requests.

options.title: services.ethereum.geth.<name>.args.bootnodes
options.description: List of bootnodes to connect to

options.title: services.ethereum.geth.<name>.args.datadir
options.description: Data directory for Geth. Defaults to '%S/geth-<name>', which generally resolves to /var/lib/geth-<name>.

options.title: services.ethereum.geth.<name>.args.gcmode
options.description: Blockchain garbage collection mode.

options.title: services.ethereum.geth.<name>.args.http.addr
options.description: HTTP-RPC server listening interface

options.title: services.ethereum.geth.<name>.args.http.api
options.description: API's offered over the HTTP-RPC interface

options.title: services.ethereum.geth.<name>.args.http.corsdomain
options.description: List of domains from which to accept cross origin requests

options.title: services.ethereum.geth.<name>.args.http.enable
options.description: Whether to enable Go Ethereum HTTP API.

options.title: services.ethereum.geth.<name>.args.http.port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: Port number of Go Ethereum HTTP API.

options.title: services.ethereum.geth.<name>.args.http.rpcprefix
options.description: HTTP path path prefix on which JSON-RPC is served. Use '/' to serve on all paths.

options.title: services.ethereum.geth.<name>.args.http.vhosts
options.description:
Comma separated list of virtual hostnames from which to accept requests (server enforced).
Accepts '*' wildcard.

options.title: services.ethereum.geth.<name>.args.maxpeers
options.description: Maximum peers to connect to.

options.title: services.ethereum.geth.<name>.args.metrics.addr
options.description: Listen address of Go Ethereum metrics service.

options.title: services.ethereum.geth.<name>.args.metrics.enable
options.description: Whether to enable Go Ethereum prometheus metrics.

options.title: services.ethereum.geth.<name>.args.metrics.port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: Port number of Go Ethereum metrics service.

options.title: services.ethereum.geth.<name>.args.netrestrict
options.description: Restrict network communication to the given IP networks (CIDR masks)

options.title: services.ethereum.geth.<name>.args.network
options.description: The network to connect to. Mainnet (null) is the default ethereum network.

options.title: services.ethereum.geth.<name>.args.networkid
options.description: The network id used for peer to peer communication

options.title: services.ethereum.geth.<name>.args.nodiscover
options.description: Disable discovery

options.title: services.ethereum.geth.<name>.args.port

options.description: Whether to enable Go Ethereum WebSocket API.

options.title: services.ethereum.helios
options.description: Specification of one or more Helios light client instances.

options.title: services.ethereum.helios.<name>.args.checkpoint
options.description: A trusted checkpoint hash. Must be the first beacon block hash of an epoch.

options.title: services.ethereum.helios.<name>.args.checkpointFallback
options.description: A fallback checkpoint sync URL used when the configured checkpoint is too outdated. Helios will query this endpoint for a recent weak subjectivity checkpoint.

options.title: services.ethereum.helios.<name>.args.consensusRpc
options.description: The consensus layer RPC endpoint URL.

options.title: services.ethereum.helios.<name>.args.datadir
options.description: Data directory for persisting sync state. Defaults to '%S/helios-<name>'.

options.title: services.ethereum.helios.<name>.args.executionRpc
options.description: The execution layer RPC endpoint URL.

options.title: services.ethereum.helios.<name>.args.loadExternalFallback
options.description: Enable fallback to community-maintained checkpoint sync APIs when the configured checkpoint is outdated. Uses the ethpandaops/checkpoint-sync-health-checks list. WARNING: no security guarantees are provided; use as a last resort.

options.title: services.ethereum.helios.<name>.args.network
options.description: The network to sync. Use 'ethereum' for mainnet, or 'optimism'/'base' for OP Stack chains.

options.title: services.ethereum.helios.<name>.args.rpc.addr
options.description: The address for the JSON-RPC server to bind to.

options.title: services.ethereum.helios.<name>.args.rpc.enable
options.description: Enable the Helios JSON-RPC server.

options.title: services.ethereum.helios.<name>.args.rpc.port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: The port for the JSON-RPC server to listen on.

options.title: services.ethereum.helios.<name>.enable
options.description: Whether to enable Helios light client..

options.title: services.ethereum.helios.<name>.extraArgs
options.description: Additional arguments to pass to Helios.

options.title: services.ethereum.helios.<name>.openFirewall
options.description: Open the RPC port in the firewall.

options.title: services.ethereum.helios.<name>.package
options.description: Package to use for the Helios binary.

options.title: services.ethereum.helios.<name>.startWhenNeeded
options.description: Whether to use socket activation to start Helios when a connection is made to the RPC port. Requires rpc.enable to be true.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-beacon
options.description: Specification of one or more lighthouse beacon chain instances.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-beacon.<name>.args.checkpoint-sync-url
options.description:
URL of a synced beacon node to trust in obtaining checkpoint sync data.
As an additional safety measure, it is strongly recommended to only use this option in conjunction with --wss-checkpoint flag

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-beacon.<name>.args.datadir
options.description: Data directory for the databases.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-beacon.<name>.args.disable-deposit-contract-sync
options.description:
Explicitly disables syncing of deposit logs from the execution node.
This overrides any previous option that depends on it.
Useful if you intend to run a non-validating beacon node.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-beacon.<name>.args.disable-quic
options.description:
Disables the quic transport.
The node will rely solely on the TCP transport for libp2p connections.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-beacon.<name>.args.disable-upnp
options.description: Disable the UPnP configuration

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-beacon.<name>.args.discovery-port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: The port used by discv5.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-beacon.<name>.args.execution-endpoint
options.description: Listen address for the execution layer.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-beacon.<name>.args.execution-jwt
options.description:
Path to a file containing a hex-encoded string representing a 32 byte secret
used for authentication with an execution node via HTTP

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-beacon.<name>.args.genesis-state-url
options.description:
URL of a synced beacon node to trust for obtaining genesis state.
As an additional safety measure, it is strongly recommended to only use this option in conjunction with --wss-checkpoint flag

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-beacon.<name>.args.http.address
options.description: Host on which the RPC server should listen.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-beacon.<name>.args.http.enable
options.description: Enable the HTTP RPC server

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-beacon.<name>.args.http.port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: RPC port exposed by a beacon node.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-beacon.<name>.args.metrics.address
options.description: Host used to listen and respond with metrics for prometheus.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-beacon.<name>.args.metrics.enable
options.description: Enable Prometheus metrics exporter.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-beacon.<name>.args.metrics.port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: Port used to listen and respond with metrics for prometheus.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-beacon.<name>.args.network
options.description: The network to connect to. Mainnet is the default ethereum network.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-beacon.<name>.args.quic-port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description:
The port used by libp2p.
Will use TCP if disable-quic is set

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-beacon.<name>.args.user
options.description: User to run the systemd service.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-beacon.<name>.enable
options.description: Whether to enable Lighthouse Ethereum Beacon Chain Node written in Rust from Sigma Prime.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-beacon.<name>.extraArgs
options.description: Additional arguments to pass to Lighthouse Beacon Chain.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-beacon.<name>.openFirewall
options.description: Open ports in the firewall for any enabled networking services

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-beacon.<name>.package
options.description: Package to use for Lighthouse binary

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-validator
options.description: Specification of one or more Lighthouse validator instances.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-validator.<name>.args.beacon-nodes
options.description:
List of Lighthouse Beacon node HTTP APIs to connect to.

When null, looks up the http address+port from the lighthouse
beacon node service with the same name.
(eg `services.ethereum.lighthouse-validator.holesky` will look
at the config of `services.ethereum.lighthouse-beacon.holesky`)

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-validator.<name>.args.datadir
options.description: Data directory for the databases.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-validator.<name>.args.graffiti
options.description: String to include in proposed blocks

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-validator.<name>.args.http.address
options.description: Host on which the REST API server should listen.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-validator.<name>.args.http.enable
options.description: Whether to enable the HTTP REST API server.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-validator.<name>.args.http.port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: REST API port exposed by a beacon node.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-validator.<name>.args.metrics.address
options.description: Host used to listen and respond with metrics for prometheus.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-validator.<name>.args.metrics.enable
options.description: Enable Prometheus metrics exporter.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-validator.<name>.args.metrics.port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: Port used to listen and respond with metrics for prometheus.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-validator.<name>.args.network
options.description: The network to connect to. Mainnet is the default ethereum network.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-validator.<name>.args.suggested-fee-recipient
options.description:
Sets ALL validators' mapping to a suggested eth
address to receive gas fees when proposing a block. note
that this is only a suggestion when integrating with a Builder API,
which may choose to specify a different fee recipient as payment
for the blocks it builds.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-validator.<name>.args.user
options.description: User to run the systemd service.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-validator.<name>.enable
options.description: Whether to enable Lighthouse Ethereum Validator Client written in Rust from Sigma Prime.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-validator.<name>.extraArgs
options.description: Additional arguments to pass to Lighthouse Validator Client.

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-validator.<name>.openFirewall
options.description: Open ports in the firewall for any enabled networking services

options.title: services.ethereum.lighthouse-validator.<name>.package
options.description: Package to use for Lighthouse binary

options.description: Specification of one or more MEV-Boost chain instances.

options.description: listen-address for mev-boost server (default 'localhost:18550')

options.title: services.ethereum.mev-boost.<name>.args.json
options.description: log in JSON format instead of text

options.title: services.ethereum.mev-boost.<name>.args.log-no-version
options.description: disables adding the version to every log entry

options.title: services.ethereum.mev-boost.<name>.args.log-service

options.title: services.ethereum.mev-boost.<name>.args.loglevel
options.description: minimum loglevel

options.title: services.ethereum.mev-boost.<name>.args.min-bid
options.description: minimum bid to accept from a relay [eth]

options.title: services.ethereum.mev-boost.<name>.args.network
options.description: The network to connect to. Mainnet (null) is the default ethereum network.

options.title: services.ethereum.mev-boost.<name>.args.relay-check
options.description: check relay status on startup and on the status API call

options.title: services.ethereum.mev-boost.<name>.args.relay-monitors
options.description: relay urls

options.title: services.ethereum.mev-boost.<name>.args.relays
options.description: relay urls

options.title: services.ethereum.mev-boost.<name>.args.request-max-retries
options.description: maximum number of retries for a relay get payload request

options.title: services.ethereum.mev-boost.<name>.args.request-timeout-getheader
options.description: timeout for getHeader requests to the relay [ms]

options.title: services.ethereum.mev-boost.<name>.args.request-timeout-getpayload
options.description: timeout for getPayload requests to the relay [ms]

options.title: services.ethereum.mev-boost.<name>.args.request-timeout-regval
options.description: timeout for registerValidator requests [ms]

options.title: services.ethereum.mev-boost.<name>.enable
options.description: Whether to enable MEV-Boost from Flashbots.

options.title: services.ethereum.nethermind

options.description: If 'true' then Health Check endpoints is enabled at /health.

options.description: Defines whether the JSON RPC service is enabled on node startup.

options.description: Host for Execution Engine RPC calls.

options.description: Host for JSON RPC calls.

options.title: services.ethereum.nethermind.<name>.args.modules.JsonRpc.JwtSecretFile

options.description: Port number for JSON RPC web sockets calls.

options.description: If 'true',the node publishes various metrics to Prometheus Pushgateway at given interval.

options.title: services.ethereum.nethermind.<name>.args.modules.Metrics.ExposePort
options.type: null or 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon
options.description: Specification of one or more Nimbus beacon chain instances.

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon.<name>.args.data-dir
options.description: Data directory for the Nimbus databases. Defaults to '%S/nimbus-beacon-<name>', which generally resolves to /var/lib/nimbus-beacon-<name>.

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon.<name>.args.doppelganger-detection
options.description: If enabled, the beacon node prudently listens for 2 epochs for attestations from a validator with the same index (a doppelganger), before sending an attestation itself. This protects against slashing (due to double-voting) but means you will miss two attestations when restarting.

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon.<name>.args.el
options.description: One or more Execution Layer Engine API URLs.

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon.<name>.args.enr-auto-update
options.description: Discovery can automatically update its ENR with the IP address and UDP port as seen by other nodes it communicates with. This option allows to enable/disable this functionality.

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon.<name>.args.graffiti
options.description: The graffiti value that will appear in proposed blocks. You can use a 0x-prefixed hex encoded string to specify raw bytes.

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon.<name>.args.history
options.description: Retention strategy for historical data

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon.<name>.args.jwt-secret
options.description: A file containing the hex-encoded 256 bit secret key to be used for verifying/generating JWT tokens.

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon.<name>.args.keymanager.address
options.description: Host used for keymanager API.

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon.<name>.args.keymanager.enable
options.description: Enable keymanager API

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon.<name>.args.keymanager.port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: Keymanager API PORT

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon.<name>.args.keymanager.token-file
options.description: Keymanager API token file

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon.<name>.args.light-client-data.import-mode
options.description: Which classes of light client data to import. Must be one of: none, only-new, full (slow startup), on-demand (may miss validator duties).

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon.<name>.args.light-client-data.max-periods
options.description: Maximum number of sync committee periods to retain light client data.

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon.<name>.args.light-client-data.serve
options.description: Whether to serve data for enabling light clients to stay in sync with the network.

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon.<name>.args.listen-address
options.description: Listening address for the Ethereum LibP2P and Discovery v5 traffic

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon.<name>.args.max-peers
options.description: The target number of peers to connect to

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon.<name>.args.metrics.address
options.description: Host used to listen and respond with metrics for prometheus.

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon.<name>.args.metrics.enable
options.description: Enable Prometheus metrics exporter.

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon.<name>.args.metrics.port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: Port used to listen and respond with metrics for prometheus.

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon.<name>.args.nat
options.description: Specify method to use for determining public address. Must be one of: any, none, upnp, pmp, extip:<IP>

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon.<name>.args.network
options.description: The Eth2 network to join

options.description: Enable external payload builder

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon.<name>.args.payload-builder.url
options.description: Payload builder URL.

options.description: Listening address of the REST server

options.description: Limit the access to the REST API to a particular hostname (for CORS-enabled clients such as browsers).

options.description: Enable the REST server

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon.<name>.args.rest.port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: Port for the REST server

options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: The port used for LibP2P traffic.

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon.<name>.args.trusted-node-url

options.title: services.ethereum.nimbus-beacon.<name>.args.udp-port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: The port used for node discovery.

options.description: User to run the systemd service.

options.title: services.ethereum.prysm-validator.<name>.args.rpc.enable

options.title: services.ethereum.prysm-validator.<name>.args.suggested-fee-recipient
options.description:
Sets ALL validators' mapping to a suggested eth\
                        address to receive gas fees when proposing a block. note\
                        that this is only a suggestion when integrating with a Builder API,\
                        which may choose to specify a different fee recipient as payment\
                        for the blocks it builds.

options.description: Whether to enable Ethereum Prysm validator client.

options.description: HTTP-RPC server listening port for the Engine API

options.description: Data directory for Reth. Defaults to '%S/reth-<name>', which generally resolves to /var/lib/reth-<name>.

options.title: services.ethereum.reth.<name>.args.full
options.description: Run full node. Only the most recent [`MINIMUM_PRUNING_DISTANCE`] block states are stored. This flag takes priority over pruning configuration in reth.toml

options.description: HTTP-RPC server listening interface.

options.description: API's offered over the HTTP-RPC interface.

options.title: services.ethereum.reth.<name>.args.metrics.port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: Metrics HTTP server listening port

options.title: services.ethereum.teku-beacon
options.description: Specification of one or more Teku beacon chain instances.

options.title: services.ethereum.teku-beacon.<name>.args.checkpoint-sync-url
options.description: The URL of a Checkpointz endpoint used to start Teku from a recent state.

options.title: services.ethereum.teku-beacon.<name>.args.data-path
options.description: The path to the Teku data directory. Defaults to '%S/teku-beacon-<name>', which generally resolves to /var/lib/teku-beacon-<name>.

options.title: services.ethereum.teku-beacon.<name>.args.data-storage-mode
options.description: The strategy for handling historical chain data.

options.title: services.ethereum.teku-beacon.<name>.args.doppelganger-detection-enabled
options.description: Enables or disables doppelganger detection.

options.title: services.ethereum.teku-beacon.<name>.args.ee-endpoint
options.description: The URL of the execution client's Engine JSON-RPC APIs.

options.title: services.ethereum.teku-beacon.<name>.args.ee-jwt-secret-file
options.description: The shared secret used to authenticate execution clients when using the Engine JSON-RPC API. Contents of file must be 32 hex-encoded bytes. This can be a relative or absolute path.

options.title: services.ethereum.teku-beacon.<name>.args.metrics.address
options.description: The host on which Prometheus accesses Teku metrics.

options.title: services.ethereum.teku-beacon.<name>.args.metrics.enable
options.description: Enable Prometheus metrics exporter.

options.title: services.ethereum.teku-beacon.<name>.args.metrics.port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: The port (TCP) on which Prometheus accesses Teku metrics.

options.title: services.ethereum.teku-beacon.<name>.args.network
options.description: The predefined network configuration.

options.title: services.ethereum.teku-beacon.<name>.args.p2p-nat-method
options.description: The method for handling NAT environments.

options.title: services.ethereum.teku-beacon.<name>.args.p2p-port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: The P2P listening ports (UDP and TCP).

options.title: services.ethereum.teku-beacon.<name>.args.rest-api.address
options.description: The interface on which the REST API listens.

options.title: services.ethereum.teku-beacon.<name>.args.rest-api.cors-origins
options.description: A list of domain URLs for CORS validation.

options.title: services.ethereum.teku-beacon.<name>.args.rest-api.enable
options.description: Enables or disables the REST API service.

options.title: services.ethereum.teku-beacon.<name>.args.rest-api.port
options.type: 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)
options.description: The REST API listening port (HTTP).

options.title: services.ethereum.teku-beacon.<name>.args.user
options.description: User to run the systemd service.

options.title: services.ethereum.teku-beacon.<name>.args.validator-keys
options.description:
The directory or file to load the encrypted keystore files and associated password files from. Keystore files must use the .json file extension, and password files must use the .txt file extension.

    When specifying directories, Teku expects to find identically named keystore and password files. For example validator_217179e.json and validator_217179e.txt.

    When specifying file names, Teku expects that the files exist.

options.title: services.ethereum.teku-beacon.<name>.args.validators-graffiti
options.description: The graffiti to add when creating a block. This is converted to bytes and padded to Bytes32.

options.title: services.ethereum.teku-beacon.<name>.args.validators-proposer-default-fee-recipient
options.description: The default recipient of transaction fees for all validator keys. When running a validator, this is an alternative to the `fee_recipient` in the default proposer configuration.

options.title: services.ethereum.teku-beacon.<name>.enable
options.description: Whether to enable Teku is an open-source Ethereum consensus client.

options.title: services.ethereum.teku-beacon.<name>.extraArgs
options.description: Additional arguments to pass to Teku Beacon Chain.

options.title: services.ethereum.teku-beacon.<name>.openFirewall
options.description: Open ports in the firewall for any enabled networking services

options.title: services.ethereum.teku-beacon.<name>.package
options.description: Package to use for Teku binary
